query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_orders,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN financialStatus = 'paid' THEN 1 END) as paid_orders,
  MIN(DATE(createdAt)) as oldest_date,
  MAX(DATE(createdAt)) as newest_date
FROM shopifyOrders;
